title: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Rajesh Kumar Singh
description: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Rajesh Kumar Singh
alternate_descriptions: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Rajesh Kumar Singh
text: MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) (CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU) (COFEPOSA UNIT) ORDER New Delhi, the 31st October,2014 S.O. 2840(E).- Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, Specially empowered under sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) issued order F.No. 673/13/2014-Cus.VIII, dated 12-09-2014 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Rajesh Kumar Singh, S/o Gambhira Singh, R/o Village Jamalpur, P.O. Amnaur, P.S Marhowrah, Dist. Saran, Bihar, be detained and kept in custody in Siliguri Correctional Home, Siliguri with a view to preventing him from engaging in transporting, concealing and keeping the smuggled goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police, Govt. of West Bengal, Kolkata within 7 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F.No. 673/13/2014-Cus-VII] HARMEET S. SINGH, Jt.Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
